item.title: Full Interview
item.description:
A recorded interview with Grandpa, covering his early life, Navy service, medicine, marriage, family, and life advice.
Chapters: 00:00 – Intro 00:50 – Earliest Memory 03:48 – When Were You Born 04:08 – Parents 05:30 – Entry Into Navy 08:06 – Navy Flying 09:58 – Carriers 10:53 – Tours At Sea 12:22 – Carrier Landings 15:09 – Fear During War 20:39 – Fond Memories of War 21:42 – Mission Beyond Darkness 22:36 – Flying History 24:40 – Entry Into Medicine 26:41 – First Love 27:44 – Proposal 28:15 – Attraction 28:30 – Ups and Downs of Marriage 28:48 – Advice for Young Couples 30:02 – Favorite Memory of Marriage 30:55 – Favorite Trip 31:25 – Three Kids 32:06 – John Conklin 36:03 – Glider Pilot 36:23 – Influence on Your Life 38:04 – Anything to Pass On 38:54 – Happiest Moments 39:38 – Decisions on Work 41:14 – Saddest Moments 42:46 – Anything to Add
